data.narrative:
Iambic Therapeutics is a Series B-stage biotech company that has raised $220M+ to date. Valuation analysis relies on a comparable universe of 8 private peers in Biotech & Health at the same stage, supplemented by 3 public sector benchmarks (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L). The peer set includes Eikon Therapeutics ($3.3B), Neko Health ($1.8B), New Limit ($810M), Asimov ($800M), and Profluent ($600M).

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a typical Series B step-up multiplier of 1.9x to the $220M total raised proxy, implying $418M. Peer-median benchmarking across the five sampled comparables yields a median valuation of $810M, with a range spanning $600M to $3.3B. Public-comp anchoring cannot be applied because Iambic's revenue is not on file; the sector P/S median of 6.6x across three public tickers is therefore unavailable for application.

The two applicable methods triangulate to a median valuation of $614M, with a plausible range of $355M (low) to $931M (high). The stage-progression result ($418M) pulls toward the lower bound, while peer-median positioning ($810M) anchors toward the upper quartile of the range. Key uncertainties include revenue run-rate (needed to validate public-comp multiples), clinical-stage risk differentiation among peers, and the extent to which recent fundraising multiples reflect fair value versus market timing.
